tasks.label: 📦 Create New Feature
tasks.command: FEATURE="${input:feature_name}" && echo "📦 Creating feature: $FEATURE..." && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/providers" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/views" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/widgets" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/views/${FEATURE}_screen.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/providers/${FEATURE}_provider.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation/providers/${FEATURE}_state.dart" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/datasources" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/models" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/repositories" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/datasources/${FEATURE}_remote_datasource.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/datasources/${FEATURE}_local_datasource.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/models/${FEATURE}_model.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data/repositories/${FEATURE}_repository_impl.dart" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/entities" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/repositories" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/usecases" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/entities/${FEATURE}.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/repositories/${FEATURE}_repository.dart" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain/usecases/get_${FEATURE}_usecase.dart" && mkdir -p "./lib/features/$FEATURE/docs/generatedSummaryMDFileByAi" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/docs/README.md" && touch "./lib/features/$FEATURE/docs/generatedSummaryMDFileByAi/AiSummary.md" && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE" && echo "" && echo "✅ Feature '$FEATURE' created successfully!" && echo "" && echo "📁 Structure created:" && echo "  ├── domain/" && echo "  │   ├── entities/${FEATURE}.dart" && echo "  │   ├── repositories/${FEATURE}_repository.dart" && echo "  │   └── usecases/get_${FEATURE}_usecase.dart" && echo "  ├── data/" && echo "  │   ├── datasources/${FEATURE}_remote_datasource.dart" && echo "  │   ├── datasources/${FEATURE}_local_datasource.dart" && echo "  │   ├── models/${FEATURE}_model.dart" && echo "  │   └── repositories/${FEATURE}_repository_impl.dart" && echo "  ├── presentation/" && echo "  │   ├── providers/${FEATURE}_provider.dart" && echo "  │   ├── providers/${FEATURE}_state.dart" && echo "  │   ├── views/${FEATURE}_screen.dart" && echo "  │   └── widgets/" && echo "  └── docs/" && echo "      ├── README.md" && echo "      └── generatedSummaryMDFileByAi/" && echo "          └── AiSummary.md" && echo "" && echo "🎯 Next steps:" && echo "  1. Implement Domain layer (entities, repositories, usecases)" && echo "  2. Implement Data layer (models, datasources, repository impl)" && echo "  3. Implement Presentation layer (Riverpod providers, views, widgets)" && echo "  4. Document feature in docs/README.md" && echo "  5. Update AI summary in docs/generatedSummaryMDFileByAi/AiSummary.md" && echo "  6. Run: dart run build_runner build"

tasks.label: 🧪 Create Feature Tests
tasks.command: FEATURE="${input:feature_name}" && echo "🧪 Creating test structure for: $FEATURE..." && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE/presentation/providers" && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE/presentation/views" && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE/data/datasources" && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE/data/repositories" && mkdir -p "./test/features/$FEATURE/domain/usecases" && touch "./test/features/$FEATURE/presentation/providers/${FEATURE}_provider_test.dart" && touch "./test/features/$FEATURE/presentation/views/${FEATURE}_screen_test.dart" && touch "./test/features/$FEATURE/data/datasources/${FEATURE}_remote_datasource_test.dart" && touch "./test/features/$FEATURE/data/repositories/${FEATURE}_repository_impl_test.dart" && touch "./test/features/$FEATURE/domain/usecases/get_${FEATURE}_usecase_test.dart" && echo "✅ Test structure created for '$FEATURE'!"

tasks.label: 📋 Validate Feature Structure
tasks.command: FEATURE="${input:feature_name}" && echo "📋 Validating feature: $FEATURE..." && if [ -d "./lib/features/$FEATURE/data" ] && [ -d "./lib/features/$FEATURE/domain" ] && [ -d "./lib/features/$FEATURE/presentation" ]; then echo "✅ Structure is valid!"; ls -R "./lib/features/$FEATURE"; else echo "❌ Invalid structure - missing required folders"; fi

tasks.label: 🧹 Flutter Clean & Get
tasks.command: echo '🧹 Cleaning Flutter project...' && flutter clean && echo '📦 Getting dependencies...' && flutter pub get && echo '✅ Done!'

tasks.label: 🔄 Build Runner (Build)
tasks.command: echo '🔄 Running build_runner...' && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && echo '✅ Build complete!'

tasks.label: 👁️ Build Runner (Watch)
tasks.command: echo '👁️ Starting build_runner in watch mode...' && dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Tests
tasks.command: echo '🧪 Running tests...' && flutter test && echo '✅ Tests complete!'

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Feature Tests
tasks.command: FEATURE="${input:feature_name}" && echo "🧪 Running tests for: $FEATURE..." && flutter test test/features/$FEATURE && echo '✅ Tests complete!'

tasks.label: 🔧 Create Core Service
tasks.command: SERVICE="${input:service_name}" && echo "🔧 Creating core service: $SERVICE..." && mkdir -p "./lib/core/services/$SERVICE" && touch "./lib/core/services/$SERVICE/${SERVICE}_service.dart" && echo "✅ Service created at lib/core/services/$SERVICE/"

tasks.label: 📝 Create Code Snippet
tasks.command: SNIPPET="${input:snippet_name}" && mkdir -p .vscode && touch "./.vscode/$SNIPPET.code-snippets" && echo "✅ Snippet file created at .vscode/$SNIPPET.code-snippets"
